summary: The diff implements most of REQ-1 and REQ-2 successfully. Frontend labels are updated from 'Short-Time' to 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' in LandingPage, JobFilters, JobListingCard, JobDetailPage, AdminDashboard, and JobPostingForm. The backend main.mo defines a new #nysc variant and a migration module is added. However, residual 'shortTerm' references remain in frontend label maps displaying 'Short-Term', and the shortTerm variant still appears in both the backend enum and migration module alongside #nysc, meaning the old variant was not fully removed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend no longer defines or accepts a 'ShortTime' job type variant.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo JobType enum still includes #shortTerm alongside #nysc. The migration module also defines NewJobType with both #shortTerm and #nysc variants. The old short-term variant was not removed, only a new #nysc variant was added alongside it.

missing_requirements.requirement: The label 'Short-Time' no longer appears anywhere in the UI.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend JOB_TYPE_LABELS maps in JobListingCard.tsx, JobDetailPage.tsx, and AdminDashboard.tsx still include a 'shortTerm: Short-Term' entry. While 'Short-Time' is replaced, 'Short-Term' remains as a displayable label for the shortTerm job type and could still appear in the UI.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data migration from old text-based job types to the new enum variants, and main.mo applies it via (with migration = Migration.run).
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states as a non-goal: 'Migrating or transforming existing job listing data stored in the backend canister.' The migration.mo file and its invocation in main.mo implement exactly this non-goal.

hallucinated_features.description: A new #shortTerm variant was retained in the backend JobType enum alongside #nysc, making it a distinct separate job type.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request asked only to rename ShortTime to NYSC while preserving other existing categories. Keeping shortTerm as a separate variant alongside nysc goes beyond a simple rename and contradicts REQ-2's requirement to remove the ShortTime variant.
